description: Default external error response shape. Use across the entire API surface.

error.message: string (short, human-readable, no PII / no internals)

status_codes.401: unauthenticated — credentials missing or invalid (same message)
status_codes.404: not_found — also used to obscure presence/absence of restricted records
status_codes.409: conflict — versioning / unique constraint without echoing constraint name
status_codes.422: validation_failed — schema violation; field list returned but no raw input echoed
